rag_rules: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations with `pre()` and `->`
Structure branching logic with nested `if ... then ... else` expressions
generic_rules: Ensure all identifiers in AGREE contracts are visible or locally declared
Place input assumptions and output guarantees only when concrete bounds or relations are provided
Use AGREE logical operators (`and`, `or`, `not`, `=>`) for contract expressions
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE guarantees must reference only visible AADL features or locally declared helpers
Mode transitions in AGREE should use `pre(mode)` for temporal recurrence
anti_patterns: Avoid referencing unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations in guarantees
Do not add architecture elements to fix type errors; instead, remove invalid clauses
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
